inputs.label: True Positives (TP)
inputs.businessContext: Number of correctly predicted positive instances.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of correctly predicted positive instances.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğru tahmin edilen pozitif örnek sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de instancias positivas correctamente predichas.

inputs.label: False Positives (FP)
inputs.businessContext: Number of incorrectly predicted positive instances.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of incorrectly predicted positive instances.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yanlış pozitif olarak tahmin edilen örnek sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de instancias positivas incorrectamente predichas.

inputs.label: False Negatives (FN)
inputs.businessContext: Number of incorrectly predicted negative instances.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of incorrectly predicted negative instances.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yanlış negatif olarak tahmin edilen örnek sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de instancias negativas incorrectamente predichas.

inputs.label: True Negatives (TN)
inputs.businessContext: Number of correctly predicted negative instances. Optional for F1 but useful for other metrics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of correctly predicted negative instances. Optional for F1 but useful for other metrics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğru negatif olarak tahmin edilen örnek sayısı. F1 için isteğe bağlı ancak diğer metrikler için kullanışlıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl korrekt vorhergesagter negativer Instanzen. Optional für F1, aber nützlich für andere Metriken.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de prédictions négatives correctes. Optionnel pour F1 mais utile pour d'autres métriques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de instancias negativas correctamente predichas. Opcional para F1 pero útil para otras métricas.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
